summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Sasha Infinity UI rebuild. Splash screen animation works perfectly with SASHA INFINITY text, counter, decorative elements. All pages load correctly with client-side routing. Navigation, forms, and filters functional. Color scheme (#f4911a orange, #082A5E dark blue) implemented correctly. No external sashainfinity.com redirects for navigation.

performance_issues.issue: Splash screen takes very long to complete due to 4.3MB .glb 3D model loading
performance_issues.impact: Poor initial user experience - users may think page is broken
performance_issues.details: 3D model (Sasha-Character.glb) causes GPU stalls and performance issues. Consider optimizing model size or implementing progressive loading.

passed_tests: Splash screen animation with SASHA INFINITY text, counter (000% to 100%), decorative dots and lines
Splash screen transition to home page after completion
Navigation bar with all required links (Home, About, Courses, Blog, Contact, Meiporul AR, Log In, Get Started)
Client-side routing between all pages - no external sashainfinity.com redirects
Courses page with functional filters (category: development/analytics, level: intermediate/advanced)
Course cards display with proper images, titles, instructors, prices, enroll buttons
Contact page with contact form, map, and contact information
Meiporul AR page with AR features, steps, and AR courses sections
Login page with email/password form, social login options, remember me checkbox
Get Started page with role selector (student/instructor) and registration form
Auth pages (login/get-started) correctly hide navbar and footer
Color scheme consistency - orange (#f4911a) primary, dark blue (#082A5E) secondary
Footer appears on all pages except login and get-started
Mobile hamburger menu structure (visible on smaller viewports)
Form submissions show appropriate UI feedback (alerts for UI-only forms)
action_item_for_main_agent: Optimize 3D model loading performance: 1) Reduce .glb file size or use compressed format, 2) Implement progressive loading for 3D model, 3) Consider showing home page content while 3D model loads in background, 4) Add loading progress indicator for better UX during splash screen
success_percentage: Frontend: 95% (all functionality works, only performance optimization needed)
